Title: Ironic Standalone Operator's controller modifies user-owned resources without consent
Description: The Ironic Standalone Operator (IRSO) is the operator to maintain an Ironic deployment for Metal3. IRSO controller automatically adds its environment label to user-provided Secrets and ConfigMaps without the resource owner's consent. A high-privilege controller modifying user-owned resources constitutes an unauthorized integrity violation. Deployments running IrSO v0.7.0 through v0.8.1 that reference user-provided Secrets or ConfigMaps (TLS certificates, BMC CA, trusted CA) are affected.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 0.7.3, all versions starting from 0.8.0 before 0.8.2
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 0.7.3 before 0.8.0, all versions starting from 0.8.2
